decision.notes: Template only. Copy to the restricted release evidence store, set template to false, and bind every receipt to one immutable release.

gates.title: Code quality and build gates
gates.notes: Formatting, lint, typecheck, tests, contracts, documentation, architecture checks, and production build.

gates.title: Application security gates
gates.notes: Repository scans, boundary suites, independent review, and finding disposition for the exact release.

gates.title: Browser usability and automated accessibility
gates.notes: Desktop/mobile journeys and representative-state accessibility automation.

gates.title: Delivery correctness
gates.notes: Authenticated send, replay, reconnect, search, attachment, provider, and administration journeys.

gates.title: Migration and data-change safety
gates.notes: Fresh migration, timing, compatibility window, rollback boundary, and reapply evidence.

gates.title: Runtime resilience
gates.notes: Production topology, readiness, replacement, reconvergence, and no acknowledged-message loss.

gates.title: Application recovery
gates.notes: PostgreSQL and object-storage backup, isolated restore, reconciliation, and attachment verification.

gates.title: Release safety and immutable artifact
gates.notes: Signed digest, retained bundle, provenance, rollback, roll-forward, and final release evidence.

gates.title: Approved infrastructure composition
gates.notes: Provisioned from reviewed provider composition with drift and access controls.

gates.title: Managed PostgreSQL durability
gates.notes: Encryption, hostname-verified TLS, PITR, capacity monitoring, independent backup, and restore drill.

gates.title: Durable object storage
gates.notes: Versioning, lifecycle, encryption, restricted credentials, restore, and reconciliation.

gates.title: Approved external providers
gates.notes: Real notification, Web Push, webhook egress, and malware-scanning providers; development adapters do not pass.

gates.title: External secret and key ownership
gates.notes: Scoped external ownership, access review, rotation, revocation, and exclusion from source, images, and logs.

gates.title: DNS, TLS, ingress, network, and observability
gates.notes: Trusted endpoints, calibrated limits, restricted policies, authenticated metrics, and internal-client verification.

gates.title: Corporate authentication policy
gates.notes: Approved local-password compensating controls or separately implemented and approved corporate OIDC/MFA.

gates.title: Production-scale performance and resilience
gates.notes: Peak-plus-headroom load, soak, reconnect, provider outage/recovery, node loss, and zone loss.

gates.title: Alert routing and actionability
gates.notes: Real receiver delivery and versioned owner, query, mitigation, stop, validation, escalation, and runbook context.

gates.title: Operating ownership and exercised authority
gates.notes: Release, rollback, recovery, security/privacy, support, incident command, and communication authority.

gates.title: Data and support-access policy
gates.notes: Classification, retention, legal hold, deletion, audit access, evidence handling, and support-content access.

gates.title: Capacity, provider, telemetry, and pilot budget
gates.notes: Approved capacity headroom, provider costs, observability retention, and pilot funding.

gates.title: Representative twelve-person study
gates.notes: Required participant mix, synthetic data, privacy contract, task evidence, SUS, and accessibility cohorts.

gates.title: Usability score gate
gates.notes: The exact-candidate structured study passes scripts/score_usability_study.mjs.

gates.title: Manual accessibility audit
gates.notes: Manual WCAG 2.2 A/AA and assistive-technology matrix with no unresolved critical or serious defect.

gates.title: Role-based member, administrator, moderator, and operator exercises
gates.notes: Exercises complete without unsafe facilitator workarounds; on-call primary duties require the documented synthetic drills.

gates.title: Two-week internal pilot
gates.notes: Twenty to thirty internal users meet activation, weekly use, support, accessibility, security, and durability thresholds.

gates.title: Cross-functional release sign-off
gates.notes: This aggregate gate passes only after every required signoff below is retained.

signoffs.notes: No approval is implied by this template.
No approval is implied by this template.
